<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">



## **BIOL427 Plant Systematics** 
is taught every Spring semester and surveys the vascular plant families, with a focus on California plants. Students prepare a dried plant collection or iNaturalist project through participation on field trips. 

<img src="images/GoldenWestCollege Native Garden_2016.jpg" style="width:90%; border:2px solid; margin-right: 20px" align="right">


<br><br><br><br><br><br>
<br><br><br><br><br><br>




<br><br><br><br><br><br>



## **BIOL439 Plant Morphology**
is taught every Fall semester. Students learn the morphology and anatomy of plants and techniques for geomorphometric analysis of plant form. 



<br><br><br>
<img src="images/Huntington.JPG" style="width:80%; border:2px solid; margin-left: 20px" align="center">
